summary: Application crashes when configuring rate limit with empty inputs
description: Users are unable to successfully configure route limits in the CLI because leaving the limit input empty causes the entire application to crash. This disrupts the configuration workflow.
expected_behavior: The application should prompt for a limit and gracefully handle empty inputs by displaying an error message, returning the user to the main command prompt rather than crashing.
actual_behavior: Pressing Enter on the 'Limit' input prompt terminates the CLI session with a system crash.
steps_to_reproduce: Type 'add' to create a counter route
Provide any name and press Enter
Press Enter without typing a limit
Observe the application crash and exit
additional_notes: Please update the command-line interface input handling to support empty input validation gracefully.
